meanings.definition: freedom from activity (work or strain or responsibility)
examples: took his repose by the swimming pool

meanings.definition: the absence of mental stress or anxiety
a disposition free from stress or emotion
put or confide something in a person or thing
examples: These philosophers reposed the law in the people

meanings.definition: lean in a comfortable resting position
examples: He was reposing on the couch
lay the books on the table
lay the patient carefully onto the bed

meanings.definition: to put something (eg trust) in something
examples: The nation reposed its confidence in the King
